rdf_pattern: obs --sosa:madeOnPlatform--> :machine_{id} a cmpo:Tool ; cmpo:toolId "{id}"
obs --cmpo:machineDataId--> literal
obs --cmpo:rawTimestamp--> literal ; obs --sosa:resultTime--> ISO datetime
notes: altLabel TIMESTAMP added in v2.0.1; epoch base is anonymised in PHM data

rdf_pattern: obs --sosa:hasFeatureOfInterest--> :wafer_{id} a cmpo:Wafer ; cmpo:hasWaferId "{id}"
notes: altLabel WAFER_ID added in v2.0.1; join key between the two CSVs (with STAGE)

rdf_pattern: obs --cmpo:duringStep--> :step_{stage}_{wafer} a cmpo:PolishingStep ; cmpo:stageLabel "A|B"
notes: altLabel STAGE added in v2.0.1; steps run on platens via cmpo:runsOnPlaten (mapping decision)

rdf_pattern: obs --sosa:madeOnPlatform--> :chamber_{n} a cmpo:Chamber (Chamber is a sosa:Platform via cmpo:Equipment)
notes: altLabel CHAMBER added in v2.0.1; CHAMBER == MACHINE_DATA in this sample (identical value sets)
